color: rgb(255, 255, 255);"><b>PROBLEM</b></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="160" x="100" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="YNMfgJXhGpWJ1RFyTCHD-4" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#150C59;strokeColor=none;align=left;" value="<div style=""><span style="background-color: transparent;"><font style="color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-size: 14px;">&nbsp;- Lack of calorie awareness</font></span></div><div style=""><font style="color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-size: 14px;"><span style="background-color: transparent;">-&nbsp;</span><span style="background-color: transparent;">Unbalanced daily meals</span></font></div><div style=""><font style="color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-size: 14px;"><font style="color: rgb(255, 255, 255);"><span style="background-color: transparent;">-&nbsp;</span></font><span style="background-color: transparent;">Hard to plan healthy menus</span></font></div><div style=""><font style="color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-size: 14px;">- Complex existing apps<span style="background-color: transparent;"></span></font></div><div style=""><font style="color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-size: 14px;">-&nbsp;Low long-term motivation</font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="160" x="100" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="YNMfgJXhGpWJ1RFyTCHD-5" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F07D00;fontColor=#000000;strokeColor=none;" value="<font style="font-size: 16px; font-size: 14px;">-&nbsp;<span style="background-color: transparent;">Personalized calorie calculation</span></font></div><div style=""><font style="color: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(237, 237, 237)); font-size: 14px;"><font style=""><span style="background-color: transparent;">-&nbsp;</span></font><span style="background-color: transparent;">Simple food logging</span></font></div><div style=""><font style="color: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(237, 237, 237)); font-size: 14px;"><span style="background-color: transparent;"><font style="">-&nbsp;</font></span><span style="background-color: transparent;">Vietnamese food database</span></font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="160" x="280" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="YNMfgJXhGpWJ1RFyTCHD-16" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F07D00;fontColor=#000000;strokeColor=none;" value="<font style="font-size: 16px; font-size: 14px;"><font style="">-&nbsp;</font><span style="background-color: transparent;">Easy and beginner-friendly</span></font></div><div style=""><font style="color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-size: 14px;"><font>-&nbsp;</font><span style="background-color: transparent;">Localized for Vietnamese users</span></font></div><div style=""><font style="color: rgb(255, 255, 255);
